title: Update Milestone Add Instructions Text Only

requirements.summary: Update only the instructional/helper text inside the 'Add Milestone' dialog in VisionBoard page to reflect new user-provided instructions, keeping all layout, fields, logic, validation, and styling unchanged
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Add Milestone' dialog/form layout, fields, and functionality are identical to the current live version.
Only the instructional/descriptive text within the milestone add UI has been updated to match the user-provided instructions.
No other pages or components are affected.

file_operations.description: Update only the instructional or helper text displayed within the 'Add Milestone' dialog or form section (e.g., label text, placeholder text, or helper descriptions) to match the new instructions provided by the user. Do not modify the dialog's layout, input fields, validation logic, state management, button handlers, or any styling. Keep the milestone add flow exactly as it exists in the current live version, changing only the text content that guides the user.
